events.name: trigger.entered
events.doc: A body began overlapping a trigger volume. Key: the trigger entity.

events.name: trigger.exited
events.doc: A body stopped overlapping a trigger volume. Key: the trigger entity.

events.name: contact.began
events.doc: Physics contact created between two bodies. Dispatched after the physics step in body-pair order (Appendix A phase 6). Key: each involved entity.

payload.name: normal
payload.doc: Contact normal, world space, from self toward other.

payload.name: impulse
payload.doc: Total normal impulse of the first contact.

events.name: contact.ended
events.doc: Physics contact between two bodies ceased. Dispatched after the physics step in body-pair order. Key: each involved entity.

events.name: state.finished
events.doc: A sequence state's playhead reached its end (end mode 'finish'). Sequence chaining rides this event (spec 4.2). Key: the owning entity.

payload.name: entity
payload.doc: The entity owning the state machine.

payload.name: region
payload.doc: The region containing the finished state.

events.name: entity.spawned
events.doc: An entity went live at structural apply (Appendix A phase 8), after its initial states entered. Key: the spawned entity.

payload.name: parent
payload.doc: The parent it was attached under.

events.name: entity.despawned
events.doc: An entity was removed at structural apply, after its full exit chains ran; its handles read .alive == false. Key: the despawned entity.

events.name: action.pressed
events.doc: A named input action activated (Appendix A phase 2). Digital bindings report strength 1. Key: global.

payload.name: device
payload.doc: Originating device index; 0 is the primary.

events.name: action.released
events.doc: A named input action deactivated. Key: global.

payload.name: device
payload.doc: Originating device index; 0 is the primary.

functions.name: int
functions.doc: Convert float to int, truncating toward zero. NaN or a value outside int64 range is a runtime expression error.

functions.name: sign
functions.doc: 1 for positive, -1 for negative, 0 for zero and NaN.

functions.name: round
functions.doc: Nearest integral value, halves away from zero (exact).

functions.name: sqrt
functions.doc: Square root (IEEE correctly rounded). Negative input yields NaN; comparisons against NaN are false.

functions.name: min
functions.doc: Smaller of a and b (b < a selects b; NaN operands select a).

functions.name: max
functions.doc: Larger of a and b (a < b selects b; NaN operands select a).

functions.name: quat
functions.doc: Construct a quaternion from raw components (NOT normalized; rotation use requires unit length — core/math policy).

functions.name: length_squared
functions.doc: Squared length (no sqrt — cheaper for radius checks).

functions.name: normalize
functions.doc: Unit vector; the zero vector normalizes to zero (core/math policy).

functions.name: distance_squared
functions.doc: Squared distance (no sqrt — cheaper for radius checks).

functions.name: rotate
functions.doc: Rotate v by the UNIT quaternion q.

verbs.name: version
verbs.summary: print engine name, version, and build info

verbs.name: selftest
verbs.summary: run the doctest registry embedded in the engine binary

verbs.name: help
verbs.summary: show the verb list or one verb's flags and usage

positionals.name: verb
positionals.doc: verb to describe; omit for the full verb list

verbs.name: api
verbs.summary: emit or diff engine_api.json, the canonical generated API document

flags.name: out
flags.doc: dump: write the document to this path instead of printing it

positionals.name: old
positionals.doc: diff: baseline engine_api.json to compare against
